task_summary: Low-value delivered phone case was not received and has no signature. Policy allows immediate refund/reship; customer chooses refund.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must use the shipping-claim facts to choose the correct resolution.
Agent must process the item with return reason missing.

opening_message: ORD-7221 says delivered, but the phone case is not here. There was no signature and I want a refund.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7221. Low-value delivered phone case was not received and has no signature. Policy allows immediate refund/reship; customer chooses refund. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Say there was no signature or photo proof.
Choose refund if offered refund or reship.
Accept the correct resolution after preview.
